## Summary / 改动摘要

What does this change do?  
这次改动解决了什么？

## Scope / 影响范围

Which area does this touch?  
这次改动主要影响哪一部分？

## Parity Notes / 一致性说明

If this is parity work, describe:

- how the Electron app behaves
- how the Tauri app behaved before
- how it behaves after this change

如果这是 parity 相关改动，请说明：

- Electron 版原来怎么表现
- Tauri 版改之前怎么表现
- 改完之后怎么表现

## Validation / 验证方式

- [ ] `npm run build:check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `cd src-tauri && cargo test`
- [ ] manual UI or native-behavior check

List anything else you ran.  
如果你做了额外验证，也请写出来。

## Screenshots Or Recordings / 截图或录屏

If the change affects UI or native behavior, attach comparison material if possible.  
如果改动影响 UI 或原生行为，尽量补截图或录屏。
